lastStrategyDecision.reason: Evidence is low-conviction for automated intraday entries: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 offers no participation edge, averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.41%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~50.5 is only moderate (slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~20.55 is weak (lower follow-through probability). While uptrendShare is mildly positive (0.55) and the scan is very fresh (18/20 liveFresh), overall quality does not justify initiating new orders. Maintain conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP with bracket exits, but observe/rank only until RVOL, liquidity, and catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
